items.title: Cycling Brand is Mocked Over AI Image of Handlebars Protruding From Bike Seat
items.summary: Cycling is all about getting outside, zooming through beautiful vistas, and just generally being in touch with reality. So it was a bizarre choice for outdoor retailer REI to use a ridiculous AI image…

items.title: LidarAC App for Tilta Nucleus-M II and Nano II Introduced – Turn Your iPhone Into a LiDAR Rangefinder
items.summary: LidarAC is a third-party iOS app that integrates with Tilta’s Nucleus Nano II, Nucleus-M, and Nucleus-M II systems, allowing you to turn your iPhone into a LiDAR rangefinder to assist with focus pulli…

items.title: Scientists Capture Footage of Spider Catapulting Prey Into Web Using Ingenious Snare Trap
items.summary: Scientists have captured incredible footage of a spider building an ingenious snare trap to catapult its prey into its web. [Read More]

items.title: ‘Supergirl’ Actor David Corenswet Lashes Out at Photographer Who Touched Co-Star’s Back at Premiere
items.summary: Supergirl actor David Corenswet was seen confronting a photographer who touched his co-star Milly Alcock’s back while asking for a photo of her at the film’s premiere. [Read More]
